steps.title: Identify the benefit-then-challenge structure
steps.content:
The passage introduces customized products as a growing trend, then explains why companies benefit (consumers pay more and wait longer) before using Still to signal a pivot to the core challenge: keeping costs low with customization.

This benefit-then-challenge pattern defines the text's structure.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice C (‘It introduces a trend in consumer products and then explains how the trend both benefits and poses a challenge to companies.’) correctly captures this structure: the passage introduces the trend, then explains both its benefits to companies and the challenge it creates.
  • A claims manufacturing innovations are discussed (they aren't).
  • B frames this as a success story with causal factors (wrong pattern).
  • D mistakenly describes contrasting techniques (the passage presents one approach, not contrasted methods).
C is correct.
